description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:11-jdk Docker image and define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS. Include a global before_script that updates apt, installs wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, sets ANDROID_HOME, downloads and extracts the Android command‑line tools zip using the ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS variable, adds the tools to PATH, runs sdkmanager to accept licenses and install the specified platform, platform‑tools and build‑tools versions, and makes gradlew executable. In the build stage add an assembleDebug job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug, is interruptible, and stores the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact. Also in the build stage add a lintDebug job that runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain lint -PbuildDir=lint, is interruptible, and publishes the app/lint/reports/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a debugTests job that runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain :app:testFdroidDebug, is interruptible, and has no artifacts.
